series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes support information including supplier test data sheets and material test worksheets. TE FORMS are used to sample identification when submitted to the lab for testing. [i.e. information from the TE form is transferred to a shared electronic database system which creates a Sample ID number which can be used to track the sampling process from start to finish].

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: in electronic database (Site Manager) permanently
